notes: Solid, complete snake implementation with title/pause/gameover states, progressive speed, high score persistence, death animation, and snake eyes — minor issue is deathFlash decrement in render causing timing inconsistency, but overall very polished.

Visuals are great, but the state machine is flawed during death (flashes the pause screen, allows restarting which is then overwritten by a delayed game over) and it suffers from the classic rapid-turn suicide bug.
A solid and mostly complete Snake build with good presentation and controls, but the death/pause state handling is awkward and localStorage access can throw in restricted environments.
